mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record (schedule_id, course_id, class_id, student_id, attendance_date, signed_at, status, source) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{courseId}, #{classId}, #{studentId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{signedAt}, #{status}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT ar.id, ci.course_name AS courseName, cl.class_name AS className, ar.attendance_date AS attendanceDate, ar.signed_at AS signedAt, ar.status AS status FROM attendance_record ar JOIN course_schedule cs ON cs.id = ar.schedule_id JOIN course_info ci ON ci.id = cs.course_id JOIN class_info cl ON cl.id = cs.class_id WHERE ar.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY ar.attendance_date DESC, ar.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS present, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absent FROM attendance_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
